title: Claude Chat - Pricing and Billing
content: Claude offers flexible pricing options. For API users: pay-as-you-go pricing based on tokens consumed. For Claude Plus subscribers: $20/month for unlimited chat access. For enterprise: contact sales for custom pricing. Your billing is tracked per month and invoiced at the end of the billing cycle. Payment methods accepted include credit cards and ACH transfers. To avoid unexpected charges, set spending limits in your account settings.
